content.text:
With my voice to Yahweh, I cry aloud;
With my voice to Yahweh, I make supplication.

I pour out my complaint before Him;
I declare my distress before Him.

When my spirit was faint within me,
You knew my path.
In the way where I walk
They have hidden a trap for me.

Give heed to my cry of lamentation,
For I am brought very low;
Deliver me from my persecutors,
For they are too strong for me.

Bring my soul out of prison,
To give thanks to Your name;
The righteous will encircle me,
For You will deal bountifully with me.”
